list.name: Changes
list.comment:
feat: enhance home screen analytics layout for responsiveness
This commit refactors the home screen's analytics grid to improve its layout on different screen sizes.
Key changes include: - Replaced the `Wrap` widget with a `Column` of `AdaptiveLayoutRowColumn` widgets to better control the arrangement of analytics cards. - Updated the `AdaptiveLayoutRowColumn` to support `expandedWidget`, `widthBetween`, and `heightBetween` properties, allowing for more flexible and spaced-out responsive layouts. - Adjusted the width of the `TreatmentStatsCardWidget` to use a fixed responsive value in landscape mode. - Updated the `navigationRailBackground` color for better UI consistency.

task.summary: refactor - added border radius and vercel deployment
update - app title and name changed
refactor - added placeholder and updated build file

refactor: enhance responsiveness and adaptive layouts
This commit introduces significant improvements to the app's responsiveness and adaptive UI capabilities.
Key changes include: - Replaced the `responsive_framework` package with a custom `ResponsiveExtension` and adaptive layout widgets (`AdaptiveLayoutRowColumn`, `AdaptiveLayoutList`) for more granular control over different screen sizes and orientations. - Refactored `Dashboard`, `HomeScreen`, and `SignInScreen` to utilize the new responsive helpers, ensuring better layout adaptation on mobile, tablet, and desktop, in both portrait and landscape modes. - Updated the theme to globally define the `hintStyle` for `InputDecorationTheme`. - Adjusted various UI components and removed redundant code to align with the new responsive strategy.

refactor: update project configuration and dependencies
This commit updates the IDE project configuration files (`.idea/*.xml`) to reflect changes in dependency paths and package versions.
Specifically, it adjusts the paths for the Dart SDK and cached packages, transitioning from `AppData/Local/Pub/Cache` to the standard `.pub-cache` directory. It also removes references to the `google_mlkit_commons` and `google_mlkit_face_detection` packages, which have been deprecated, and updates other dependency versions like `go_router` and `flutter_riverpod`.
Additionally, minor layout adjustments were made in the dashboard's navigation rail for better consistency.

feat: enhance home screen analytics layout for responsiveness
This commit refactors the home screen's analytics grid to improve its layout on different screen sizes.
Key changes include: - Replaced the `Wrap` widget with a `Column` of `AdaptiveLayoutRowColumn` widgets to better control the arrangement of analytics cards. - Updated the `AdaptiveLayoutRowColumn` to support `expandedWidget`, `widthBetween`, and `heightBetween` properties, allowing for more flexible and spaced-out responsive layouts. - Adjusted the width of the `TreatmentStatsCardWidget` to use a fixed responsive value in landscape mode. - Updated the `navigationRailBackground` color for better UI consistency.

MESSAGE.value: refactor - added border radius and vercel deployment
update - app title and name changed
refactor - added placeholder and updated build file

refactor: enhance responsiveness and adaptive layouts
This commit introduces significant improvements to the app's responsiveness and adaptive UI capabilities.
Key changes include: - Replaced the `responsive_framework` package with a custom `ResponsiveExtension` and adaptive layout widgets (`AdaptiveLayoutRowColumn`, `AdaptiveLayoutList`) for more granular control over different screen sizes and orientations. - Refactored `Dashboard`, `HomeScreen`, and `SignInScreen` to utilize the new responsive helpers, ensuring better layout adaptation on mobile, tablet, and desktop, in both portrait and landscape modes. - Updated the theme to globally define the `hintStyle` for `InputDecorationTheme`. - Adjusted various UI components and removed redundant code to align with the new responsive strategy.

refactor: update project configuration and dependencies
This commit updates the IDE project configuration files (`.idea/*.xml`) to reflect changes in dependency paths and package versions.
Specifically, it adjusts the paths for the Dart SDK and cached packages, transitioning from `AppData/Local/Pub/Cache` to the standard `.pub-cache` directory. It also removes references to the `google_mlkit_commons` and `google_mlkit_face_detection` packages, which have been deprecated, and updates other dependency versions like `go_router` and `flutter_riverpod`.
Additionally, minor layout adjustments were made in the dashboard's navigation rail for better consistency.

feat: enhance home screen analytics layout for responsiveness
This commit refactors the home screen's analytics grid to improve its layout on different screen sizes.
Key changes include: - Replaced the `Wrap` widget with a `Column` of `AdaptiveLayoutRowColumn` widgets to better control the arrangement of analytics cards. - Updated the `AdaptiveLayoutRowColumn` to support `expandedWidget`, `widthBetween`, and `heightBetween` properties, allowing for more flexible and spaced-out responsive layouts. - Adjusted the width of the `TreatmentStatsCardWidget` to use a fixed responsive value in landscape mode. - Updated the `navigationRailBackground` color for better UI consistency.

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value:
feat: enhance home screen analytics layout for responsiveness
This commit refactors the home screen's analytics grid to improve its layout on different screen sizes.
Key changes include: - Replaced the `Wrap` widget with a `Column` of `AdaptiveLayoutRowColumn` widgets to better control the arrangement of analytics cards. - Updated the `AdaptiveLayoutRowColumn` to support `expandedWidget`, `widthBetween`, and `heightBetween` properties, allowing for more flexible and spaced-out responsive layouts. - Adjusted the width of the `TreatmentStatsCardWidget` to use a fixed responsive value in landscape mode. - Updated the `navigationRailBackground` color for better UI consistency.
